title: Wikipedia on Old Browsers
description: The mobile version of Wikipedia loads perfectly in Safari Leopard WebKit and Aquafox. Bookmark en.m.wikipedia.org for fast research.
author: Altivec
content:
Wikipedia on Your G4

Use en.m.wikipedia.org for lightweight version.
